title: Update to F28 and new run format in baseline test
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Updates the baseline tests to use Fedora 28 and to use the new `buildah run` format.  This test is NOT run under CI, only 'by hand' to test/verify kits.
